_meta.description: Shipment readiness gate configuration. Defines required checks before an SO can transition to 'shipped'. Per AS9100D clause 8.6 Release of products.

gate_items.label: Contract Review Completed
gate_items.label_vi: Xem xét hợp đồng hoàn thành
gate_items.description: All contract review checklist items approved or marked N/A

gate_items.label: All Job Orders Completed
gate_items.description: Every JO linked to this SO must be in 'completed' or 'closed' status

gate_items.label: No Open NCRs
gate_items.description: No unresolved nonconformance reports linked to this SO or its JOs/WOs

gate_items.label: No Active Holds
gate_items.label_vi: Không có hold đang hoạt động
gate_items.description: SO has no unreleased credit, engineering, quality, or shipping holds

gate_items.label: Required Documents Received
gate_items.label_vi: Tài liệu yêu cầu đã nhận
gate_items.description: All required documents (CoC, CoA, material certs, test reports) received and verified

gate_items.label: CAPA Actions Closed
gate_items.description: All corrective/preventive actions linked to this SO are closed and verified effective

gate_items.label: FAI Approved
gate_items.description: First Article Inspection approved (required for new parts or new processes)

gate_items.label: Export Control Cleared
gate_items.label_vi: Kiểm soát xuất khẩu đã thông qua
gate_items.description: ITAR/EAR export license obtained if required

gate_items.label: Packing & Labeling Confirmed
gate_items.label_vi: Đóng gói và nhãn mác đã xác nhận
gate_items.description: Packing specification and labeling requirements verified

gate_items.label: Customer Source Inspection
gate_items.description: Customer witness/source inspection completed if required by contract
